data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of contingency planning, specifically the need for backup venues. However, the evidence does not confirm that a backup venue is explicitly reserved or available as part of the booking process. The linked use case mentions that an indoor backup is automatically reserved if an outdoor ceremony is selected, but there is no evidence provided that this condition was met or that the backup venue was confirmed in the booking process.
gaps: No evidence of a backup venue being confirmed or reserved as part of the booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
